channel.title: Ramesh Sees It Differently on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Ramesh Sees It Differently on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Ramesh Sees It Differently — Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: Ramesh is encouraged by the GDF's heroic terrain navigation, heartened by another hospital sod-turning, and notes that the Harpy Eagles begin their title defence today.

item.title: Ramesh Sees It Differently — Saturday, April 11, 2026
item.description: Ramesh reflects on a historic oil quarter, the President's visionary diplomacy in Port of Spain, and America's ongoing love affair with Guyana's potential.

item.title: Ramesh Sees It Differently — April 10, 2026
item.description: G$159 billion in Q1, Gulf investment talks, digital road safety, and new police — Ramesh explains why each development confirms what he has always believed about this administration.
